title: Obfuscated - horror chat responder
description: Adds configurable psychological horror messages that are sent when players send specific messages in chat!
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, please join the discord server

---

This mod adds the feature from some horror mods, such as the broken script, that respond to your messages in chat! This mod is very lightweight and will not affect performance at all. All triggers and responses are configurable via the config folder. To access the config folder:

run the game once if not done already > open the modpack folder > open the "config" folder > edit the triggers and responses through "horrormessagesconfig.json"

no config file for fabric or forge 1.19.2, sorry </3

IMPORTANT: WHEN EDITING CONFIG FOLDER, MAKE SURE TRIGGERS ARE ALL LOWERCASE AND HAVE NO PUNCUTATION (! ? , .)

Message list and responses:

1. where are you - <obfuscated> Watching.
2. can you see me - <obfuscated> Yes.
3. is anyone there - <obfuscated>
4. corruption -  <obfuscated> Soon.
5. i hate you -  <obfuscated> Suffer.
6. leave me alone -  <obfuscated> Too late.
7. the broken end -  <obfuscated> Familiar.
8. who are you -  <username> You.
9. hello -  <username> Hi.
10. what do you want -  <username> More.

And over 20 secret ones! (join discord server for full list)
